caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a solid black background, speaking toward the camera. She wears a light green, long-sleeved garment with small red floral patterns and a decorative embroidered neckline, complemented by a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a circular gold logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk, her mouth moving and her facial expressions shifting slightly as she delivers her message. Her posture remains consistent, centered in the frame, with the lighting focused on her face and torso, creating a sharp contrast against the dark backdrop. No other people or objects are present in the environment.
